message:
refactor(tui): Consolidate V key for pressure overlay and fix key bindings

App.tsx changes:
- Remove duplicate PackagingPressureOverlay import
- Import TranscriptionFlowOverlay (placeholder for future feature)
- Add TRANSCRIPTION_ID constant
- Consolidate V key handler (was duplicated in two places)
- V key now toggles pressure overlay with intermediate promotion
- Fix indentation for M/Z key handlers

Footer.tsx key binding updates:
- O key: 3D pause (was V)
- Z key: 3D fullscreen (newly exposed in footer)
- R key: 3D quality (unchanged)
- V key: Pressure gauge (intermediate+ only, in conditional block)
- G/X/J/L keys: Remain gated to intermediate+ users

Key binding reorganization rationale:
- V was overloaded (3D pause AND pressure) - now only pressure
- O is mnemonic for "pOse" or "stOp" for 3D pause
- V is mnemonic for "Visualization" of pressure gauge
- Consistent with depth layer philosophy (V is Layer 1 overlay)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
